content.text:
Task: Research how to create a skill for a coding agent system called "pi". A skill is a markdown file that provides specialized instructions to an AI agent. Research: what makes a good agent skill/system prompt, best practices for writing agent instructions, how to structure agent skills for clarity and effectiveness, what sections/components a skill file should have, and how to guide an agent through complex multi-step workflows. Look at the pi skill documentation at /opt/homebrew/lib/node_modules/@mariozechner/pi-coding-agent/docs/skills.md and any existing skill files in /opt/homebrew/lib/node_modules/pi-web-access/skills/ and /opt/homebrew/lib/node_modules/pi-subagents/skills/ as concrete examples. Also research general best practices for writing LLM system prompts and agent instructions from the web.

---
**Output:** Write your findings to: /Users/user/research.md

message.errorMessage: 400 tools.0.custom.eager_input_streaming: Extra inputs are not permitted
